title: GSE320498 BALB/c Adriamycin Nephropathy Substrain Re-analysis: Reviewer-Response Supplementary Code
description:
DESeq2 v1.38.3 + fgsea v1.24.0 re-analysis of GSE320498 (glomerulus-enriched RNA-seq, BALB/cAJcl vs BALB/cByJcl adriamycin nephropathy substrain comparison), prepared in response to peer review.

Includes: a corrected GSEA ranking-metric methodology (DESeq2 Wald statistic, matching the significance-weighted ranking implied by the manuscript's reported FDR values); Fig. 6B/C/D replacement enrichment figures generated directly from the canonical fgsea run; an independently sourced podocyte marker gene set (Karaiskos et al. 2018 J Am Soc Nephrol 29:2060-2068, GSE111107) with full extraction provenance and a gene-set-membership overlap accounting; and a verification that the manuscript's likely original differential-expression method (edgeR classic exactTest()) and this revision's method (DESeq2) agree on every reported conclusion (log2FC Pearson r ≥ 0.9998 in every comparison; all named genes and all focal GSEA gene sets concordant in direction and significance).

See README_analysis_log.md for the full analysis log, correspondence table (review comment -> output), and 9 key findings. License and access right are placeholders pending author confirmation.
